# Attribute Config

The table below uses only div attributes for the controlled table DSL.

::: {.table type="comparison" density="compact" width="0.92" caption="Controlled attribute comparison" label="tab:controlled-attributes" header="true" striped="true"}
| Model | Strength | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Baseline | Stable | Ordinary comparison row |
| Tuned | Faster | Compact comparison row |
| Reviewer | Safer | Checks labels and captions |
:::

The paragraph after the controlled table must remain ordinary text.
